close_reason: Added a new top-level livebooks teaching surface with README, concept template, and the first provider-free Your First Agent notebook. Tested all Elixir code fences locally, opened and synced the notebook through Livebook dev endpoints at localhost:32123, and ran format, compile, tests, docs, doctor, credo, and package dry run.
description: Create a new top-level livebooks folder, establish a reusable teaching template for Jidoka concepts, build the first concept Livebook, and test it with Livebook dev endpoints where available.
title: Build Livebook concept template
